title: dodecatheon conjugens subsp. leptophyllum
intro: Dodecatheon conjugens subsp. leptophyllum, also known as Western or Western Pasque Flower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the gentian family, Gentianaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The Western Pasque Flower is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and its herbal preparations are often used to address a range of health concerns, including infections and allergies.
